article_meta.title: Family Welcome To The Future, Where AI Grandma Raises The Kid You Bought From The Baby Bank By: Elle Purnell November 19

reasoning: Strong, compliant analysis that flags multiple clear instances of author-level bias without attributing quotes to the author. Minor issues with one label choice and a few missed biased phrases.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items are from the author's own prose; no quoted or attributed source language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagged passages are genuinely biased in author voice. One item labeled as 'Slant' could be debated but still reflects partisan framing.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed several additional clear instances (e.g., 'haunt your children forever,' 'porn-addled society,' 'prey on parents’ desire,' 'ripped away from his birth mother'). Still, many major examples were captured.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Most labels are apt (e.g., Word Choice, Sensationalism, Opinion-as-fact, Mind Reading). The 'Slant' label is questionable and might better fit Unsubstantiated Claims or Opinion-as-fact.
